name: pinboard
description: Spatial bulletin board: a $space-shaped wall that holds movable $note objects. Pins are $pin < $note instances with an optional color; the board owns layout (x/y/w/h/z per pin) and presence. Pins can be taken off the board, dropped in rooms, picked up, and posted onto another board, all using ordinary $portable take/drop infrastructure. Subclass $pin for richer per-note behavior (voting, ephemeral, timestamped) without changing the board.

classes.description: Pinboard note. Adds an optional .color (default null, displayed white when null). Otherwise inherits all $note semantics: text, read/write/erase, is_readable_by, is_writable_by, look. Pins are first-class movable: take one off a board, drop it in a room, post it on a different board, recycle it. The pin remembers its color across moves.

verbs.name: set_color
verbs.source: verb :set_color(color) rx { if (color != null && typeof(color) != "string") { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "color must be a string or null", value: color }; } if (!this:is_writable_by(actor)) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "cannot recolor pin", value: this }; } this.color = color; observe({ type: "pin_recolored", actor: actor, pin: this, color: color, ts: now() }); return true; }

classes.description: Shared spatial bulletin board. Holds $note descendants in .contents; tracks per-pin layout in a parallel map keyed by pin object id. Posting moves a pin into the board; taking moves it back to the actor's inventory. Board owners can :eject any pin; pin owners can :take their own. Subscribe to the board with :enter to receive incremental observations.

verbs.name: title
verbs.source: verb :title() rxd { return this.name + " on the wall"; }

verbs.name: look_self
verbs.source: verb :look_self() rxd { let pins = this:list_notes(); let count = length(pins); let suffix = " notes"; if (count == 1) { suffix = " note"; } let summary = this.name + " — " + to_string(count) + suffix + ". Enter the pinboard to open it."; observe({ type: "looked", actor: actor, to: actor, room: this, text: summary, look: { id: this, title: this.name, description: this.description, notes: pins, present_actors: this.subscribers, viewport: this.viewport }, ts: now() }); return { id: this, title: this.name, description: this.description, notes: pins, present_actors: this.subscribers, viewport: this.viewport }; }

verbs.name: enter
verbs.source: verb :enter() rxd { set_presence(this, true); let text = actor.name + " starts working at " + this.name + "."; observe({ type: "pinboard_entered", actor: actor, board: this, text: text, ts: now() }); if (this.mount_room != null) { observe_to_space(this.mount_room, { type: "pinboard_activity", source: this.mount_room, board: this, actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); } return this.subscribers; }

verbs.name: leave
verbs.source: verb :leave() rxd { set_presence(this, false); let text = actor.name + " steps back from " + this.name + "."; observe({ type: "pinboard_left", actor: actor, board: this, text: text, ts: now() }); if (this.mount_room != null) { observe_to_space(this.mount_room, { type: "pinboard_activity", source: this.mount_room, board: this, actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); } return this.subscribers; }

verbs.name: viewport
verbs.source: verb :viewport(x, y, w, h, scale) rxd { observe({ type: "pinboard_viewport", actor: actor, board: this, x: x, y: y, w: w, h: h, scale: scale, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: list_notes
verbs.source: verb :list_notes() rxd { let layout = this.layout; let pins = []; for pin in contents(this) { let key = to_string(pin); let layout_entry = { x: 48, y: 48, w: 180, h: 110, z: 1 }; if (has(layout, key)) { layout_entry = layout[key]; } let color = null; if (typeof(pin.color) == "string") { color = pin.color; } pins = pins + [{ id: pin, name: pin.name, color: color, owner: pin.owner, x: layout_entry["x"], y: layout_entry["y"], w: layout_entry["w"], h: layout_entry["h"], z: layout_entry["z"] }]; } return pins; }

verbs.name: enterfunc
verbs.source: verb :enterfunc(object) rx { let key = to_string(object); let layout = this.layout; if (!has(layout, key)) { let z = this.next_z; this.next_z = z + 1; let count = length(contents(this)); layout[key] = { x: 48 + ((count - 1) * 32), y: 48 + ((count - 1) * 26), w: 180, h: 110, z: z }; this.layout = layout; } observe({ type: "pin_added", actor: actor, board: this, pin: object, ts: now() }); if (this.mount_room != null) { observe_to_space(this.mount_room, { type: "pinboard_activity", source: this.mount_room, board: this, actor: actor, pin: object, text: actor.name + " pinned a note to " + this.name + ".", ts: now() }); } return true; }

verbs.name: exitfunc
verbs.source: verb :exitfunc(object) rx { let key = to_string(object); let layout = this.layout; if (has(layout, key)) { let next = {}; for k in keys(layout) { if (k != key) { next[k] = layout[k]; } } this.layout = next; } observe({ type: "pin_removed", actor: actor, board: this, pin: object, ts: now() }); if (this.mount_room != null) { observe_to_space(this.mount_room, { type: "pinboard_activity", source: this.mount_room, board: this, actor: actor, pin: object, text: actor.name + " took a note from " + this.name + ".", ts: now() }); } return true; }

verbs.name: post
verbs.source: verb :post(pin) rx { if (!isa(pin, $note)) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "only notes can be posted", value: pin }; } move(pin, this); return pin; }

verbs.name: take
verbs.source: verb :take(pin) rx { if (location(pin) != this) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "that note is not on this board", value: pin }; } if (pin.owner != actor && !has_flag(actor, "wizard")) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "only the pin's author may take it; board owners use eject", value: pin }; } move(pin, actor); return pin; }

verbs.name: eject
verbs.source: verb :eject(pin) rx { if (location(pin) != this) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "that note is not on this board", value: pin }; } if (this.owner != actor && !has_flag(actor, "wizard")) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "only the board owner may eject pins", value: pin }; } move(pin, actor); return pin; }

verbs.name: move_pin
verbs.source: verb :move_pin(pin, x, y) rx { if (location(pin) != this) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "that note is not on this board", value: pin }; } let key = to_string(pin); let layout = this.layout; if (!has(layout, key)) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "layout entry missing", value: pin }; } let entry = layout[key]; let z = this.next_z; this.next_z = z + 1; entry["x"] = floor(x); entry["y"] = floor(y); entry["z"] = z; layout[key] = entry; this.layout = layout; observe({ type: "pin_moved", actor: actor, board: this, pin: pin, x: entry["x"], y: entry["y"], z: z, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: resize_pin
verbs.source: verb :resize_pin(pin, w, h) rx { if (location(pin) != this) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "that note is not on this board", value: pin }; } let key = to_string(pin); let layout = this.layout; if (!has(layout, key)) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "layout entry missing", value: pin }; } let entry = layout[key]; entry["w"] = max(100, min(420, floor(w))); entry["h"] = max(72, min(320, floor(h))); layout[key] = entry; this.layout = layout; observe({ type: "pin_resized", actor: actor, board: this, pin: pin, w: entry["w"], h: entry["h"], ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: add_note
verbs.source: verb :add_note(text, color, x, y, w, h) rx { /* TODO(pinboard-v0.2): blocked on the moveto-hook pipeline. The current create() builtin accepts only (parent, owner?), but this verb wants name/description/location at construction. Either route through the builder surface (requires actor inheriting $builder) or wait for moveto + a create-with-options primitive. Body kept as the eventual shape. */ if (typeof(text) != "string" || !text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "add_note requires text" }; } let pin = create($pin, { name: "sticky note", description: "A sticky note pinned to " + this.name + ".", location: this }); pin:set_text([text]); if (typeof(color) == "string" && color in this.palette) { pin:set_color(color); } let key = to_string(pin); let layout = this.layout; let entry = layout[key]; if (typeof(x) == "number") { entry["x"] = floor(x); } if (typeof(y) == "number") { entry["y"] = floor(y); } if (typeof(w) == "number") { entry["w"] = max(100, min(360, floor(w))); } if (typeof(h) == "number") { entry["h"] = max(72, min(260, floor(h))); } layout[key] = entry; this.layout = layout; let note_record = { id: pin, name: pin.name, color: pin.color, owner: pin.owner, x: entry["x"], y: entry["y"], w: entry["w"], h: entry["h"], z: entry["z"] }; observe({ type: "note_added", actor: actor, board: this, pin: pin, note: note_record, ts: now() }); return note_record; }
